notes: v267 — Your quick-filter bar now has a name: 📡 Market Radar. A label sits at the left of it — your market at a glance, and tap any tile to filter the whole app to just those shares. Also added a new one-tap chip: Vol 50–100% — shares whose volume is 50% to 100% above their own average (1.5×–2×). That's the EARLY pick-up in interest, sitting below the big Vol ≥200% surge — handy for catching shares just starting to get busy before they show up in the extreme-volume filters. Like every chip it stacks with the others and filters every view.
